communityPosts.title: Remote frontend internship for CSE students
communityPosts.text: We are hiring remote frontend interns. Skills: React, JavaScript, basic REST API. CSE students can apply. Deadline June 15. Paid internship.
comments: I applied last month. They asked React hooks and one small API task.
This is good for beginners if you know HTML CSS JavaScript.

communityPosts.title: Beginner AI cybersecurity research idea
communityPosts.text: For final year project, try ML based intrusion detection. Start with NSL-KDD or CICIDS dataset. Compare Random Forest, SVM, and simple neural network. Focus on explainability and false positive reduction.
comments: Good beginner topic. Add SHAP explanation to make it stronger.
Dataset cleaning and feature selection are important.

communityPosts.title: Masters scholarship official application reminder
communityPosts.text: Reminder: check official university pages before applying. Some scholarship posts are fake. Always verify deadline, eligibility, and required documents from official website.
comments: Yes, many fake agents post scholarship ads.
Official page is safer than random Google form.

communityPosts.title: MongoDB Atlas connection error solution
communityPosts.text: If MongoDB Atlas connection fails, check IP whitelist, connection string password encoding, database user permission, and network access. For Node.js, use dotenv and never hardcode the URI.
comments: My issue was IP whitelist 0.0.0.0/0 for testing.
Password had @ symbol and needed URL encoding.

webSources.title: Software Engineering Intern Application
webSources.text: Official application page for Software Engineering Internship. Requirements include JavaScript, React, REST APIs, Git, and basic problem solving. Remote applicants may apply.
webSources.snippet: Official internship application page with requirements, deadline, and application form.

webSources.title: Intrusion Detection Dataset Guide for Beginners
webSources.text: A beginner guide to intrusion detection datasets including NSL-KDD, CICIDS, preprocessing, feature selection, model comparison, evaluation metrics, precision, recall, F1 score, and false positive analysis.
webSources.snippet: Guide for ML-based intrusion detection research projects and datasets.

webSources.text: Official scholarship page for international masters applicants. Includes eligibility, required documents, English language requirements, funding amount, and deadline.
webSources.snippet: Official scholarship page with eligibility, documents, and deadline.
